nasb.text: As for the likeness of their faces, they were the same faces whose appearance I had seen by the river Chebar. Each one went straight ahead.

esv.text: And as for the likeness of their faces, they were the same faces whose appearance I had seen by the Chebar canal. Each one of them went straight forward.

cnv.text: 至於他們臉孔的形狀，就像我從前在迦巴魯河邊所看見的一樣。他們每個都是朝著臉孔的方向行走。

ccb.text: 他们的面貌和我在迦巴鲁河边所见的一样，每一个都向前直走。
